$comment: Bundle size budgets for the desktop renderer. Sizes are gzipped bytes, measured at apps/desktop/out/renderer/. Each phase of spec/changes/active/desktop-frontend-perf-tuneup tightens the relevant entries; do not loosen without updating that change folder.

entries.name: main entry (index-*.js)
entries.$baseline: 368 KB on 2026-05-16, post-Node-24 toolchain. P6 target: <= 250 KB.

entries.name: markdown vendor
entries.$baseline: 100 KB on 2026-05-16. P6 removes this manual chunk; entry becomes optional after that.

entries.name: settings page bundle
entries.$baseline: 50 KB on 2026-05-16. P2 should reduce this materially via second-level lazy loading.
